model is an anonymity-set model. The set is the number of INDEPENDENT         depositors in a batch. A batch cannot be dispatched before `minBatchAge` has elapsed,         giving organic depositors time to accumulate. This is the same honest tradeoff Zama         documents for its v1 vault stack: meaningful privacy vs. passive observers, materially         higher cost to actively deanonymize, NOT unconditional privacy against an adversary         willing to dominate a batch.         The contract NEVER branches on encrypted values. Conditional logic uses FHE.select and         the ERC-7984 \"no-revert, transfer 0\" convention. A batch can never get permanently         stuck: every deposit can be reclaimed via quit() before dispatch, and a dispatched         batch either settles or is cancelled.","errors":{"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. The only value         that ever leaves the encrypted domain is the pool-wide sum."},"join(uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"The router must be an ERC-7984 operator for the caller on the deposit token         (call depositToken.setOperator(router, until) first), exactly like the OZ         confidential swap pattern. The confidential pull uses confidentialTransferFrom,         which transfers 0 (never reverts) if the user is short, preventing balance leaks.","params":{"encryptedAmount":"Externally-encrypted euint64 deposit amount.","inputProof":"ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).","vaultId":"The registered vault to deposit into."}},"migrate(uint256,uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"details":"This is the headline composability flow demonstrated end-to-end: a confidential asset         hops from one public DeFi venue's accounting into another's, fully encrypted, in one         transaction surface. The migrant inherits the destination batch's anonymity set, and         the moved amount never appears in cleartext at any point.         Settlement of the destination batch is then identical to a normal deposit: the         aggregate is decrypted, a single pooled deposit hits vault B, and the migrant claims         confidential vault-B shares pro-rata \u2014 so the migrated batch can never get stuck.         The router must be an operator for the caller on the destination DEPOSIT token.","params":{"encryptedAmount":"Externally-encrypted euint64 amount of confidential deposit tokens.","fromVaultId":"Source vault id (for event/UX context only).","inputProof":"ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).","toVaultId":"Destination registered vault to migrate into."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"pendingOwner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the pending owner."},"quit(uint256)":{"details":"Returns the caller's confidential deposit back and zeroes their batch entry.         Always available pre-dispatch, so funds are never trapped."},"registerVault(address,address,address)":{"params":{"depositToken":"The ERC-7984 wrapper over `vault.asset()` (e.g. cUSDC).","shareToken":"The ERC-7984 wrapper over the vault's share token.","vault":"The public ERC-4626 yield vault."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"settleBatchCallback(uint256,bytes,bytes)":{"details":"MUST verify the gateway signatures. The decrypted value is the pool total, not any         individual's amount."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer."}},"stateVariables":{"minBatchAge":{"details":"Owner-tunable knob trading settlement speed for anonymity-set size."}},"title":"ConfidentialVaultRouter","version":1},"userdoc":{"errors":{"HandlesAlreadySavedForRequestID()":[{"notice":"Returned if some handles were already saved for corresponding ID."}],"InvalidKMSSignatures()":[{"notice":"Returned if the returned KMS signatures are not valid."}],"NoHandleFoundForRequestID()":[{"notice":"Returned if there was not handle found for the requested ID."}]},"events":{"DecryptionFulfilled(uint256)":{"notice":"This event is emitted when requested decryption has been fulfilled."}},"kind":"user","methods":{"claim(uint256)":{"notice":"Claim your confidential vault shares from a SETTLED batch, computed pro-rata in         the encrypted domain: shares_i = deposit_i * totalShares / totalAssets."},"currentAnonymitySet(uint256)":{"notice":"The current anonymity-set size (distinct depositors) of a vault's open batch."},"depositOf(uint256,address)":{"notice":"Encrypted handle of the caller's deposit in a batch (user-decryptable by them)."},"dispatchBatch(uint256)":{"notice":"Dispatch the open batch for a vault: closes it to new joins, requests decryption         of ONLY the aggregate total, and opens the next batch immediately."},"getBatch(uint256)":{"notice":"Public, non-sensitive view of a batch's lifecycle and anonymity-set size."},"join(uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Join the currently-open deposit batch for `vaultId` with an encrypted amount."},"migrate(uint256,uint256,bytes32,bytes)":{"notice":"Move a confidential position from one vault to another in a single click, without         ever revealing the amount. The user supplies confidential deposit tokens (e.g. cUSDC         they hold after exiting vault A, or fresh balance) and the router credits them into         the OPEN batch of the destination vault B in the encrypted domain."},"minBatchAge()":{"notice":"Minimum age (in seconds) a batch must reach before it can be dispatched."},"openBatchOf(uint256)":{"notice":"The id of the currently-open batch for a given vault (0 means none open)."},"quit(uint256)":{"notice":"Reclaim a pending deposit from an OPEN batch before it is dispatched."},"reclaim(uint256)":{"notice":"Reclaim your original confidential deposit from a CANCELLED batch."},"registerVault(address,address,address)":{"notice":"Register a public ERC-4626 vault and the confidential wrappers around its         asset and share tokens, making it routable."},"setMinBatchAge(uint64)":{"notice":"Update the minimum batch age (anonymity-set vs. speed knob)."},"setVaultEnabled(uint256,bool)":{"notice":"Enable or pause new joins for a registered vault."},"settleBatchCallback(uint256,bytes,bytes)":{"notice":"Gateway callback delivering the decrypted aggregate total. Performs the single         pooled vault deposit and records the public batch-wide exchange rate inputs."}},"notice":"A confidential, composable yield router for the Zama Protocol.         Users deposit a confidential token (an ERC-7984 wrapper over an ERC-20, e.g. cUSDC)         into one of several registered public ERC-4626 yield vaults (e.g. a Morpho vault),         WITHOUT revealing their individual deposit amount on-chain.         The privacy comes from POOLING: many users join a batch with encrypted amounts;         the contract aggregates them homomorphically; at dispatch ONLY the aggregate total         is decrypted; a single deposit is routed into the public vault on behalf of the whole         pool; and each user claims their confidential vault-share balance back pro-rata,         entirely in the encrypted domain.         This is the Season 3 \"Composable Privacy\" thesis made concrete: a confidential asset         (ERC-7984) composed with the rest of the public EVM (ERC-4626) through an audited         pooling pattern, with a one-click confidential cross-vault MIGRATION on top \u2014 a flow         that the official single-vault v1 batcher does not yet expose to users.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"contracts/ConfidentialVaultRouter.sol":"ConfidentialVaultRouter"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs","useLiteralContent":true},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"@fhevm/solidity/config/ZamaConfig.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause-Clear\npragma solidity ^0.8.24;\n\nimport {SepoliaZamaOracleAddress} from \"@zama-fhe/oracle-solidity/address/ZamaOracleAddress.sol\";\nimport {FHE} from \"@fhevm/solidity/lib/FHE.sol\";\nimport {CoprocessorConfig} from \"@fhevm/solidity/lib/Impl.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title   ZamaConfig.\n * @notice  This library returns the FHEVM config for different networks\n *          with the contract addresses for (1) ACL, (2) CoprocessorAddress, (3) DecryptionOracleAddress, (4) KMSVerifier,\n *          which are deployed & maintained by Zama. It also returns the address of the decryption oracle.\n */\nlibrary ZamaConfig {\n    function getSepoliaProtocolId() internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        /// @note Zama Ethereum Sepolia protocol id is '10000 + Zama Ethereum protocol id'\n        return 10001;\n    }\n\n    function getSepoliaConfig() internal pure returns (CoprocessorConfig memory) {\n        return\n            CoprocessorConfig({\n                ACLAddress: 0x687820221192C5B662b25367F70076A37bc79b6c,\n                CoprocessorAddress: 0x848B0066793BcC60346Da1F49049357399B8D595,\n                DecryptionOracleAddress: SepoliaZamaOracleAddress,\n                KMSVerifierAddress: 0x1364cBBf2cDF5032C47d8226a6f6FBD2AFCDacAC\n            });\n    }\n\n    function getEthereumProtocolId() internal pure returns (uint256) {\n        /// @note Zama Ethereum protocol id is '1'\n        return 1;\n    }\n\n    function getEthereumConfig() internal pure returns (CoprocessorConfig memory) {\n        /// @note The addresses below are placeholders and should be replaced with actual addresses\n        /// once deployed on the Ethereum mainnet.\n        return\n            CoprocessorConfig({\n                ACLAddress: address(0),\n                CoprocessorAddress: address(0),\n                DecryptionOracleAddress: address(0),\n                KMSVerifierAddress: address(0)\n            });\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * @title   SepoliaConfig.\n * @dev     This contract can be inherited by a contract wishing to use the FHEVM contracts provided by Zama\n *          on instructions from these providers.\n */\ncontract SepoliaConfig {\n    constructor() {\n        FHE.setCoprocessor(ZamaConfig.getSepoliaConfig());\n    }\n\n    function protocolId() public pure returns (uint256) {\n        return ZamaConfig.getSepoliaProtocolId();\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * @title   EthereumConfig.\n * @dev     This contract can be inherited by a contract wishing to use the FHEVM SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause-Clear\npragma solidity ^0.8.27;\n\nimport {FHE, euint64, externalEuint64} from \"@fhevm/solidity/lib/FHE.sol\";\nimport {SepoliaConfig} from \"@fhevm/solidity/config/ZamaConfig.sol\";\nimport {Ownable, Ownable2Step} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable2Step.sol\";\nimport {ReentrancyGuard} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/ReentrancyGuard.sol\";\nimport {IERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/interfaces/IERC20.sol\";\nimport {SafeERC20} from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/utils/SafeERC20.sol\";\n\nimport {IERC4626Minimal} from \"./interfaces/IERC4626Minimal.sol\";\nimport {IConfidentialToken} from \"./interfaces/IConfidentialToken.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title ConfidentialVaultRouter\n * @author VeilYield\n * @notice A confidential, composable yield router for the Zama Protocol.\n *\n *         Users deposit a confidential token (an ERC-7984 wrapper over an ERC-20, e.g. cUSDC)\n *         into one of several registered public ERC-4626 yield vaults (e.g. a Morpho vault),\n *         WITHOUT revealing their individual deposit amount on-chain.\n *\n *         The privacy comes from POOLING: many users join a batch with encrypted amounts;\n *         the contract aggregates them homomorphically; at dispatch ONLY the aggregate total\n *         is decrypted; a single deposit is routed into the public vault on behalf of the whole\n *         pool; and each user claims their confidential vault-share balance back pro-rata,\n *         entirely in the encrypted domain.\n *\n *         This is the Season 3 \"Composable Privacy\" thesis made concrete: a confidential asset\n *         (ERC-7984) composed with the rest of the public EVM (ERC-4626) through an audited\n *         pooling pattern, with a one-click confidential cross-vault MIGRATION on top \u2014 a flow\n *         that the official single-vault v1 batcher does not yet expose to users.\n *\n * @dev    Privacy model is an anonymity-set model. The set is the number of INDEPENDENT\n *         depositors in a batch. A batch cannot be dispatched before `minBatchAge` has elapsed,\n *         giving organic depositors time to accumulate. This is the same honest tradeoff Zama\n *         documents for its v1 vault stack: meaningful privacy vs. passive observers, materially\n *         higher cost to actively deanonymize, NOT unconditional privacy against an adversary\n *         willing to dominate a batch.\n *\n *         The contract NEVER branches on encrypted values. Conditional logic uses FHE.select and\n *         the ERC-7984 \"no-revert, transfer 0\" convention. A batch can never get permanently\n *         stuck: every deposit can be reclaimed via quit() before dispatch, and a dispatched\n *         batch either settles or is cancelled.\n */\ncontract ConfidentialVaultRouter is SepoliaConfig, Ownable2Step, ReentrancyGuard {\n    using SafeERC20 for IERC20;\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                              Types\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    enum BatchStatus {\n        Open, // accepting joins\n        Dispatched, // total unwrap requested, awaiting decryption callback\n        Settled, // vault deposit done, users may claim\n        Cancelled // recovered; users may reclaim original deposits\n    }\n\n    struct VaultInfo {\n        IERC4626Minimal vault; // public ERC-4626 yield vault (e.g. Morpho)\n        IConfidentialToken depositToken; // confidential wrapper over the vault's asset (cUSDC)\n        IConfidentialToken shareToken; // confidential wrapper over the vault's share token\n        bool enabled; // owner can pause new joins for a vault\n        bool exists;\n    }\n\n    struct Batch {\n        uint256 vaultId;\n        BatchStatus status;\n        uint64 createdAt;\n        euint64 encryptedTotal; // homomorphic sum of all joined deposits (encrypted)\n        uint256 decryptionRequestId; // gateway request id for total decryption\n        uint64 clearTotalAssets; // decrypted aggregate of underlying assets (set on settle)\n        uint64 clearTotalShares; // vault shares minted to the pool (set on settle)\n        uint32 depositorCount; // number of distinct depositors that joined\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                              Storage\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /// @notice Minimum age (in seconds) a batch must reach before it can be dispatched.\n    /// @dev Owner-tunable knob trading settlement speed for anonymity-set size.\n    uint64 public minBatchAge;\n\n    uint256 public vaultCount;\n    mapping(uint256 vaultId => VaultInfo) public vaults;\n\n    /// @notice The id of the currently-open batch for a given vault (0 means none open).\n    mapping(uint256 vaultId => uint256 batchId) public openBatchOf;\n\n    uint256 public batchCount;\n    mapping(uint256 batchId => Batch) private _batches;\n\n    /// @notice Per-user encrypted deposit recorded in a batch.\n    mapping(uint256 batchId => mapping(address user => euint64)) private _depositOf;\n    /// @notice Whether a user has already been counted as a depositor in a batch.\n    mapping(uint256 batchId => mapping(address user => bool)) private _hasJoined;\n    /// @notice Whether a user has already claimed/reclaimed from a batch.\n    mapping(uint256 batchId => mapping(address user => bool)) private _claimed;\n\n    /// @notice Reverse lookup: decryption request id -> batch id.\n    mapping(uint256 requestId => uint256 batchId) private _requestToBatch;\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                              Events\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    event VaultRegistered(uint256 indexed vaultId, address vault, address depositToken, address shareToken);\n    event VaultEnabled(uint256 indexed vaultId, bool enabled);\n    event MinBatchAgeUpdated(uint64 newMinBatchAge);\n\n    event BatchOpened(uint256 indexed batchId, uint256 indexed vaultId);\n    event Joined(uint256 indexed batchId, address indexed user);\n    event Quit(uint256 indexed batchId, address indexed user);\n    event BatchDispatched(uint256 indexed batchId, uint256 indexed vaultId, uint256 requestId);\n    event BatchSettled(uint256 indexed batchId, uint256 indexed vaultId, uint64 totalAssets, uint64 totalShares);\n    event BatchCancelled(uint256 indexed batchId, uint256 indexed vaultId);\n    event Claimed(uint256 indexed batchId, address indexed user);\n\n    event MigrationRequested(\n        address indexed user,\n        uint256 indexed fromVaultId,\n        uint256 indexed toVaultId,\n        uint256 toBatchId\n    );\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                              Errors\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    error VaultDoesNotExist(uint256 vaultId);\n    error VaultDisabled(uint256 vaultId);\n    error BatchNotOpen(uint256 batchId);\n    error BatchNotDispatchable(uint256 batchId);\n    error BatchTooYoung(uint256 batchId, uint64 readyAt);\n    error BatchNotSettled(uint256 batchId);\n    error BatchNotCancelled(uint256 batchId);\n    error AlreadyClaimed(uint256 batchId, address user);\n    error NothingToClaim(uint256 batchId, address user);\n    error InvalidRequestId(uint256 requestId);\n    error SameVault();\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                            Constructor\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    constructor(uint64 minBatchAge_) Ownable(msg.sender) {\n        minBatchAge = minBatchAge_;\n        emit MinBatchAgeUpdated(minBatchAge_);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                          Admin functions\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Register a public ERC-4626 vault and the confidential wrappers around its\n     *         asset and share tokens, making it routable.\n     * @param vault The public ERC-4626 yield vault.\n     * @param depositToken The ERC-7984 wrapper over `vault.asset()` (e.g. cUSDC).\n     * @param shareToken The ERC-7984 wrapper over the vault's share token.\n     */\n    function registerVault(\n        IERC4626Minimal vault,\n        IConfidentialToken depositToken,\n        IConfidentialToken shareToken\n    ) external onlyOwner returns (uint256 vaultId) {\n        vaultId = ++vaultCount;\n        vaults[vaultId] = VaultInfo({\n            vault: vault,\n            depositToken: depositToken,\n            shareToken: shareToken,\n            enabled: true,\n            exists: true\n        });\n        emit VaultRegistered(vaultId, address(vault), address(depositToken), address(shareToken));\n        emit VaultEnabled(vaultId, true);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Enable or pause new joins for a registered vault.\n    function setVaultEnabled(uint256 vaultId, bool enabled) external onlyOwner {\n        if (!vaults[vaultId].exists) revert VaultDoesNotExist(vaultId);\n        vaults[vaultId].enabled = enabled;\n        emit VaultEnabled(vaultId, enabled);\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Update the minimum batch age (anonymity-set vs. speed knob).\n    function setMinBatchAge(uint64 newMinBatchAge) external onlyOwner {\n        minBatchAge = newMinBatchAge;\n        emit MinBatchAgeUpdated(newMinBatchAge);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                          Core: join a batch\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Join the currently-open deposit batch for `vaultId` with an encrypted amount.\n     * @dev    The router must be an ERC-7984 operator for the caller on the deposit token\n     *         (call depositToken.setOperator(router, until) first), exactly like the OZ\n     *         confidential swap pattern. The confidential pull uses confidentialTransferFrom,\n     *         which transfers 0 (never reverts) if the user is short, preventing balance leaks.\n     * @param vaultId The registered vault to deposit into.\n     * @param encryptedAmount Externally-encrypted euint64 deposit amount.\n     * @param inputProof ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).\n     */\n    function join(\n        uint256 vaultId,\n        externalEuint64 encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata inputProof\n    ) external nonReentrant returns (uint256 batchId) {\n        VaultInfo storage v = vaults[vaultId];\n        if (!v.exists) revert VaultDoesNotExist(vaultId);\n        if (!v.enabled) revert VaultDisabled(vaultId);\n\n        batchId = _ensureOpenBatch(vaultId);\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n\n        // Verify the external ciphertext and bind it to a usable handle.\n        euint64 amount = FHE.fromExternal(encryptedAmount, inputProof);\n\n        // Pull the user's confidential deposit token into the router. Measure what actually\n        // arrived (handles the \"user is short -> 0 transferred\" case without leaking).\n        FHE.allowTransient(amount, address(v.depositToken));\n        euint64 balanceBefore = v.depositToken.confidentialBalanceOf(address(this));\n        v.depositToken.confidentialTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount);\n        euint64 balanceAfter = v.depositToken.confidentialBalanceOf(address(this));\n        euint64 received = FHE.sub(balanceAfter, balanceBefore);\n\n        // Record / accumulate the user's deposit for this batch.\n        euint64 prev = _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender];\n        euint64 userTotal = FHE.isInitialized(prev) ? FHE.add(prev, received) : received;\n        _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender] = userTotal;\n\n        // Accumulate the batch-wide encrypted total.\n        b.encryptedTotal = FHE.isInitialized(b.encryptedTotal)\n            ? FHE.add(b.encryptedTotal, received)\n            : received;\n\n        // Permissions: the contract must keep operating on these handles across txs; the user\n        // must be able to user-decrypt their own deposit in the frontend.\n        FHE.allowThis(userTotal);\n        FHE.allow(userTotal, msg.sender);\n        FHE.allowThis(b.encryptedTotal);\n\n        if (!_hasJoined[batchId][msg.sender]) {\n            _hasJoined[batchId][msg.sender] = true;\n            b.depositorCount += 1;\n        }\n\n        emit Joined(batchId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Reclaim a pending deposit from an OPEN batch before it is dispatched.\n     * @dev    Returns the caller's confidential deposit back and zeroes their batch entry.\n     *         Always available pre-dispatch, so funds are never trapped.\n     */\n    function quit(uint256 batchId) external nonReentrant {\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        if (b.status != BatchStatus.Open) revert BatchNotOpen(batchId);\n\n        euint64 userDeposit = _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender];\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(userDeposit)) revert NothingToClaim(batchId, msg.sender);\n\n        VaultInfo storage v = vaults[b.vaultId];\n\n        // Remove from the running total and zero the user entry.\n        b.encryptedTotal = FHE.sub(b.encryptedTotal, userDeposit);\n        FHE.allowThis(b.encryptedTotal);\n\n        euint64 zero = FHE.asEuint64(0);\n        _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender] = zero;\n        FHE.allowThis(zero);\n        FHE.allow(zero, msg.sender);\n\n        // Refund the confidential deposit token.\n        FHE.allowTransient(userDeposit, address(v.depositToken));\n        v.depositToken.confidentialTransfer(msg.sender, userDeposit);\n\n        emit Quit(batchId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                        Core: dispatch a batch\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Dispatch the open batch for a vault: closes it to new joins, requests decryption\n     *         of ONLY the aggregate total, and opens the next batch immediately.\n     * @dev    Permissionless \u2014 anyone may dispatch once the batch is old enough. The only value\n     *         that ever leaves the encrypted domain is the pool-wide sum.\n     */\n    function dispatchBatch(uint256 batchId) external nonReentrant {\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        if (b.status != BatchStatus.Open) revert BatchNotDispatchable(batchId);\n\n        uint64 readyAt = b.createdAt + minBatchAge;\n        if (block.timestamp < readyAt) revert BatchTooYoung(batchId, readyAt);\n\n        // Close this batch for new joins; clear it as the vault's open batch.\n        b.status = BatchStatus.Dispatched;\n        if (openBatchOf[b.vaultId] == batchId) {\n            openBatchOf[b.vaultId] = 0;\n        }\n\n        // If nobody contributed, cancel immediately (nothing to decrypt).\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(b.encryptedTotal)) {\n            b.status = BatchStatus.Cancelled;\n            emit BatchCancelled(batchId, b.vaultId);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Request asynchronous decryption of the aggregate total only.\n        bytes32[] memory cts = new bytes32[](1);\n        cts[0] = FHE.toBytes32(b.encryptedTotal);\n        uint256 requestId = FHE.requestDecryption(cts, this.settleBatchCallback.selector);\n\n        b.decryptionRequestId = requestId;\n        _requestToBatch[requestId] = batchId;\n\n        emit BatchDispatched(batchId, b.vaultId, requestId);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Gateway callback delivering the decrypted aggregate total. Performs the single\n     *         pooled vault deposit and records the public batch-wide exchange rate inputs.\n     * @dev    MUST verify the gateway signatures. The decrypted value is the pool total, not any\n     *         individual's amount.\n     */\n    function settleBatchCallback(\n        uint256 requestId,\n        bytes memory cleartexts,\n        bytes memory decryptionProof\n    ) external nonReentrant {\n        FHE.checkSignatures(requestId, cleartexts, decryptionProof);\n\n        uint256 batchId = _requestToBatch[requestId];\n        if (batchId == 0) revert InvalidRequestId(requestId);\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        if (b.status != BatchStatus.Dispatched) revert BatchNotDispatchable(batchId);\n\n        uint64 totalAssets = abi.decode(cleartexts, (uint64));\n        delete _requestToBatch[requestId];\n\n        // Degenerate case: everyone quit before dispatch -> total decrypts to 0. Cancel cleanly.\n        if (totalAssets == 0) {\n            b.status = BatchStatus.Cancelled;\n            emit BatchCancelled(batchId, b.vaultId);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        VaultInfo storage v = vaults[b.vaultId];\n\n        // Cross the confidential -> plaintext boundary for the aggregate only: unwrap the pooled\n        // confidential deposit token into the plaintext ERC-20 asset the vault understands.\n        v.depositToken.unwrap(address(this), address(this), totalAssets);\n\n        IERC20 asset = IERC20(v.vault.asset());\n        asset.forceApprove(address(v.vault), totalAssets);\n\n        // Single pooled deposit into the public ERC-4626 vault.\n        uint256 sharesOut = v.vault.deposit(totalAssets, address(this));\n        uint64 totalShares = _toUint64(sharesOut);\n\n        // Wrap the received plaintext shares back into the confidential share token, held by the\n        // router, so users can claim confidential shares.\n        IERC20 shareUnderlying = IERC20(v.shareToken.underlying());\n        shareUnderlying.forceApprove(address(v.shareToken), totalShares);\n        v.shareToken.wrap(address(this), totalShares);\n\n        b.clearTotalAssets = totalAssets;\n        b.clearTotalShares = totalShares;\n        b.status = BatchStatus.Settled;\n\n        emit BatchSettled(batchId, b.vaultId, totalAssets, totalShares);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                        Core: claim shares\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Claim your confidential vault shares from a SETTLED batch, computed pro-rata in\n     *         the encrypted domain: shares_i = deposit_i * totalShares / totalAssets.\n     * @dev    deposit_i stays encrypted end-to-end; only the public batch-wide ratio is used.\n     */\n    function claim(uint256 batchId) external nonReentrant {\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        if (b.status != BatchStatus.Settled) revert BatchNotSettled(batchId);\n        if (_claimed[batchId][msg.sender]) revert AlreadyClaimed(batchId, msg.sender);\n\n        euint64 userDeposit = _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender];\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(userDeposit)) revert NothingToClaim(batchId, msg.sender);\n\n        _claimed[batchId][msg.sender] = true;\n\n        VaultInfo storage v = vaults[b.vaultId];\n\n        // Encrypted pro-rata: (deposit * totalShares) / totalAssets, all on euint64.\n        euint64 userShares = FHE.div(FHE.mul(userDeposit, b.clearTotalShares), b.clearTotalAssets);\n\n        FHE.allowTransient(userShares, address(v.shareToken));\n        v.shareToken.confidentialTransfer(msg.sender, userShares);\n\n        emit Claimed(batchId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Reclaim your original confidential deposit from a CANCELLED batch.\n     */\n    function reclaim(uint256 batchId) external nonReentrant {\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        if (b.status != BatchStatus.Cancelled) revert BatchNotCancelled(batchId);\n        if (_claimed[batchId][msg.sender]) revert AlreadyClaimed(batchId, msg.sender);\n\n        euint64 userDeposit = _depositOf[batchId][msg.sender];\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(userDeposit)) revert NothingToClaim(batchId, msg.sender);\n\n        _claimed[batchId][msg.sender] = true;\n\n        VaultInfo storage v = vaults[b.vaultId];\n        FHE.allowTransient(userDeposit, address(v.depositToken));\n        v.depositToken.confidentialTransfer(msg.sender, userDeposit);\n\n        emit Claimed(batchId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //              Signature feature: one-click confidential migration\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /**\n     * @notice Move a confidential position from one vault to another in a single click, without\n     *         ever revealing the amount. The user supplies confidential deposit tokens (e.g. cUSDC\n     *         they hold after exiting vault A, or fresh balance) and the router credits them into\n     *         the OPEN batch of the destination vault B in the encrypted domain.\n     *\n     * @dev    This is the headline composability flow demonstrated end-to-end: a confidential asset\n     *         hops from one public DeFi venue's accounting into another's, fully encrypted, in one\n     *         transaction surface. The migrant inherits the destination batch's anonymity set, and\n     *         the moved amount never appears in cleartext at any point.\n     *\n     *         Settlement of the destination batch is then identical to a normal deposit: the\n     *         aggregate is decrypted, a single pooled deposit hits vault B, and the migrant claims\n     *         confidential vault-B shares pro-rata \u2014 so the migrated batch can never get stuck.\n     *\n     *         The router must be an operator for the caller on the destination DEPOSIT token.\n     *\n     * @param fromVaultId Source vault id (for event/UX context only).\n     * @param toVaultId Destination registered vault to migrate into.\n     * @param encryptedAmount Externally-encrypted euint64 amount of confidential deposit tokens.\n     * @param inputProof ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).\n     */\n    function migrate(\n        uint256 fromVaultId,\n        uint256 toVaultId,\n        externalEuint64 encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata inputProof\n    ) external nonReentrant returns (uint256 toBatchId) {\n        if (fromVaultId == toVaultId) revert SameVault();\n        VaultInfo storage to = vaults[toVaultId];\n        if (!vaults[fromVaultId].exists) revert VaultDoesNotExist(fromVaultId);\n        if (!to.exists) revert VaultDoesNotExist(toVaultId);\n        if (!to.enabled) revert VaultDisabled(toVaultId);\n\n        euint64 amount = FHE.fromExternal(encryptedAmount, inputProof);\n\n        // Pull the user's confidential destination-deposit tokens into the router; measure what\n        // actually arrived (no-revert-on-short, no leak) \u2014 same mechanics as join().\n        FHE.allowTransient(amount, address(to.depositToken));\n        euint64 balBefore = to.depositToken.confidentialBalanceOf(address(this));\n        to.depositToken.confidentialTransferFrom(msg.sender, address(this), amount);\n        euint64 balAfter = to.depositToken.confidentialBalanceOf(address(this));\n        euint64 received = FHE.sub(balAfter, balBefore);\n\n        toBatchId = _ensureOpenBatch(toVaultId);\n        Batch storage tb = _batches[toBatchId];\n\n        euint64 prev = _depositOf[toBatchId][msg.sender];\n        euint64 credited = FHE.isInitialized(prev) ? FHE.add(prev, received) : received;\n        _depositOf[toBatchId][msg.sender] = credited;\n\n        tb.encryptedTotal = FHE.isInitialized(tb.encryptedTotal)\n            ? FHE.add(tb.encryptedTotal, received)\n            : received;\n\n        FHE.allowThis(credited);\n        FHE.allow(credited, msg.sender);\n        FHE.allowThis(tb.encryptedTotal);\n\n        if (!_hasJoined[toBatchId][msg.sender]) {\n            _hasJoined[toBatchId][msg.sender] = true;\n            tb.depositorCount += 1;\n        }\n\n        emit MigrationRequested(msg.sender, fromVaultId, toVaultId, toBatchId);\n        emit Joined(toBatchId, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                          View functions\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    /// @notice Encrypted handle of the caller's deposit in a batch (user-decryptable by them).\n    function depositOf(uint256 batchId, address user) external view returns (euint64) {\n        return _depositOf[batchId][user];\n    }\n\n    /// @notice Public, non-sensitive view of a batch's lifecycle and anonymity-set size.\n    function getBatch(\n        uint256 batchId\n    )\n        external\n        view\n        returns (\n            uint256 vaultId,\n            BatchStatus status,\n            uint64 createdAt,\n            uint64 readyAt,\n            uint32 depositorCount,\n            uint64 clearTotalAssets,\n            uint64 clearTotalShares\n        )\n    {\n        Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n        return (\n            b.vaultId,\n            b.status,\n            b.createdAt,\n            b.createdAt + minBatchAge,\n            b.depositorCount,\n            b.clearTotalAssets,\n            b.clearTotalShares\n        );\n    }\n\n    /// @notice The current anonymity-set size (distinct depositors) of a vault's open batch.\n    function currentAnonymitySet(uint256 vaultId) external view returns (uint32) {\n        uint256 batchId = openBatchOf[vaultId];\n        if (batchId == 0) return 0;\n        return _batches[batchId].depositorCount;\n    }\n\n    function hasClaimed(uint256 batchId, address user) external view returns (bool) {\n        return _claimed[batchId][user];\n    }\n\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n    //                          Internal helpers\n    // ---------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n    function _ensureOpenBatch(uint256 vaultId) internal returns (uint256 batchId) {\n        batchId = openBatchOf[vaultId];\n        if (batchId == 0) {\n            batchId = ++batchCount;\n            Batch storage b = _batches[batchId];\n            b.vaultId = vaultId;\n            b.status = BatchStatus.Open;\n            b.createdAt = uint64(block.timestamp);\n            openBatchOf[vaultId] = batchId;\n            emit BatchOpened(batchId, vaultId);\n        }\n    }\n\n    function _toUint64(uint256 x) internal pure returns (uint64) {\n        require(x <= type(uint64).max, \"amount exceeds uint64\");\n        return uint64(x);\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x60c9ab6e1972708cadfd2e859f1ce3d25be5c51642cb0f6f73f086cea7fccaaa","license":"BSD-3-Clause-Clear"},"contracts/interfaces/IConfidentialToken.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause-Clear\npragma solidity ^0.8.27;\n\nimport {euint64} from \"@fhevm/solidity/lib/FHE.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @title IConfidentialToken\n * @notice The exact slice of the ERC-7984 confidential-token surface that the VeilYield router\n *         depends on, plus the ERC-20 wrap/unwrap surface of a confidential wrapper.\n *\n * @dev    This is intentionally a minimal, self-contained interface rather than OpenZeppelin's\n *         full IERC7984 / IERC7984ERC20Wrapper. The OZ interfaces carry many additional members\n *         (eight transfer permutations, contractURI, confidentialTotalSupply, ERC-165, a two-step\n *         async unwrap, etc.) and are under rapid 0.x development. Pinning to this minimal surface\n *         keeps the router decoupled from that churn while remaining 100% semantically faithful to\n *         ERC-7984: encrypted euint64 balances, encrypted transfers, ACL-gated decryption, and the\n *         \"no revert on insufficient balance, transfer 0\" convention.\n *\n *         A production deployment would point these at the official Zama confidential wrappers\n *         (cUSDC, cWETH, ...) which expose the same confidentialTransfer / confidentialTransferFrom\n *         / confidentialBalanceOf / setOperator / isOperator behavior.\n */\ninterface IConfidentialToken {\n    // --- ERC-7984 core (subset used by the router) ---\n\n    function confidentialBalanceOf(address account) external view returns (euint64);\n\n    function isOperator(address holder, address spender) external view returns (bool);\n\n    function setOperator(address operator, uint48 until) external;\n\n    /// @notice Transfer an already-ACL-allowed encrypted amount. Returns amount actually moved.\n    function confidentialTransfer(address to, euint64 amount) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /// @notice Operator transfer of an already-ACL-allowed encrypted amount. Returns amount moved.\n    function confidentialTransferFrom(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount\n    ) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    // --- ERC-20 wrapper surface (subset used by the router) ---\n\n    /// @notice The public ERC-20 token underlying this confidential wrapper.\n    function underlying() external view returns (address);\n\n    /// @notice Wrap `amount` of the underlying ERC-20 (pulled from caller) into confidential tokens\n    ///         credited to `to`.\n    function wrap(address to, uint256 amount) external;\n\n    /// @notice Unwrap a cleartext `amount` (the decrypted pool aggregate) of confidential tokens\n    ///         held by `from`, sending the underlying ERC-20 to `to`.\n    function unwrap(address from, address to, uint64 amount) external;\n}\n","keccak256":"0xb40d6f398d3a19d4ed5c7291be51e1bcead97c11e7e3a956f6565df0ed927bfd","license":"BSD-3-Clause-Clear"},"contracts/interfaces/IERC4626Minimal.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause-Clear\npragma solidity ^0.8.27;\n\n/**\n * @title IERC4626Minimal\n * @notice The minimal slice of the ERC-4626 tokenized-vault standard the router needs.\n *         Any public yield vault (e.g. a Morpho/Steakhouse vault) exposes this surface.\n */\ninterface IERC4626Minimal {\n    /// @notice The underlying asset managed by the vault (e.g. USDC).\n    function asset() external view returns (address);\n\n    /// @notice Deposit `assets` of the underlying, minting shares to `receiver`.\n    /// @return shares The amount of vault shares minted.\n    function deposit(uint256 assets, address receiver) external returns (uint256 shares);\n\n    /// @notice Redeem `shares`, sending the underlying assets to `receiver`.\n    /// @return assets The amount of underlying assets returned.\n    function redeem(uint256 shares, address receiver, address owner) external returns (uint256 assets);\n\n    /// @notice Preview how many shares a deposit of `assets` would mint.\n    function previewDeposit(uint256 assets) external view returns (uint256 shares);\n\n    /// @notice Preview how many assets a redemption of `shares` would return.\n    function previewRedeem(uint256 shares) external view returns (uint256 assets);\n\n    /// @notice Current total assets under management (used for APY display off-chain).\n    function totalAssets() external view returns (uint256);\n}\n","keccak256":"0x9365631fd8880ddd4e76d9278e8ccd18a7ceca4f7a9aae902bc1c15d7da59200","license":"BSD-3-Clause-Clear"},"encrypted-types/EncryptedTypes.sol":{"content":"// devdoc.author: VeilYield
devdoc.details: Privacy model is an anonymity-set model. The set is the number of INDEPENDENT         depositors in a batch. A batch cannot be dispatched before `minBatchAge` has elapsed,         giving organic depositors time to accumulate. This is the same honest tradeoff Zama         documents for its v1 vault stack: meaningful privacy vs. passive observers, materially         higher cost to actively deanonymize, NOT unconditional privacy against an adversary         willing to dominate a batch.         The contract NEVER branches on encrypted values. Conditional logic uses FHE.select and         the ERC-7984 "no-revert, transfer 0" convention. A batch can never get permanently         stuck: every deposit can be reclaimed via quit() before dispatch, and a dispatched         batch either settles or is cancelled.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

claim(uint256).details: deposit_i stays encrypted end-to-end; only the public batch-wide ratio is used.

dispatchBatch(uint256).details: Permissionless — anyone may dispatch once the batch is old enough. The only value         that ever leaves the encrypted domain is the pool-wide sum.

join(uint256,bytes32,bytes).details: The router must be an ERC-7984 operator for the caller on the deposit token         (call depositToken.setOperator(router, until) first), exactly like the OZ         confidential swap pattern. The confidential pull uses confidentialTransferFrom,         which transfers 0 (never reverts) if the user is short, preventing balance leaks.

params.inputProof: ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).
params.vaultId: The registered vault to deposit into.

migrate(uint256,uint256,bytes32,bytes).details: This is the headline composability flow demonstrated end-to-end: a confidential asset         hops from one public DeFi venue's accounting into another's, fully encrypted, in one         transaction surface. The migrant inherits the destination batch's anonymity set, and         the moved amount never appears in cleartext at any point.         Settlement of the destination batch is then identical to a normal deposit: the         aggregate is decrypted, a single pooled deposit hits vault B, and the migrant claims         confidential vault-B shares pro-rata — so the migrated batch can never get stuck.         The router must be an operator for the caller on the destination DEPOSIT token.

params.encryptedAmount: Externally-encrypted euint64 amount of confidential deposit tokens.
params.fromVaultId: Source vault id (for event/UX context only).
params.inputProof: ZK proof binding the ciphertext to (this contract, msg.sender).
params.toVaultId: Destination registered vault to migrate into.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

quit(uint256).details: Returns the caller's confidential deposit back and zeroes their batch entry.         Always available pre-dispatch, so funds are never trapped.

params.shareToken: The ERC-7984 wrapper over the vault's share token.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

settleBatchCallback(uint256,bytes,bytes).details: MUST verify the gateway signatures. The decrypted value is the pool total, not any         individual's amount.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

minBatchAge.details: Owner-tunable knob trading settlement speed for anonymity-set size.

claim(uint256).notice: Claim your confidential vault shares from a SETTLED batch, computed pro-rata in         the encrypted domain: shares_i = deposit_i * totalShares / totalAssets.

currentAnonymitySet(uint256).notice: The current anonymity-set size (distinct depositors) of a vault's open batch.

depositOf(uint256,address).notice: Encrypted handle of the caller's deposit in a batch (user-decryptable by them).

dispatchBatch(uint256).notice: Dispatch the open batch for a vault: closes it to new joins, requests decryption         of ONLY the aggregate total, and opens the next batch immediately.

getBatch(uint256).notice: Public, non-sensitive view of a batch's lifecycle and anonymity-set size.

join(uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Join the currently-open deposit batch for `vaultId` with an encrypted amount.

migrate(uint256,uint256,bytes32,bytes).notice: Move a confidential position from one vault to another in a single click, without         ever revealing the amount. The user supplies confidential deposit tokens (e.g. cUSDC         they hold after exiting vault A, or fresh balance) and the router credits them into         the OPEN batch of the destination vault B in the encrypted domain.

minBatchAge().notice: Minimum age (in seconds) a batch must reach before it can be dispatched.

openBatchOf(uint256).notice: The id of the currently-open batch for a given vault (0 means none open).

quit(uint256).notice: Reclaim a pending deposit from an OPEN batch before it is dispatched.

reclaim(uint256).notice: Reclaim your original confidential deposit from a CANCELLED batch.

registerVault(address,address,address).notice: Register a public ERC-4626 vault and the confidential wrappers around its         asset and share tokens, making it routable.

setMinBatchAge(uint64).notice: Update the minimum batch age (anonymity-set vs. speed knob).

setVaultEnabled(uint256,bool).notice: Enable or pause new joins for a registered vault.

settleBatchCallback(uint256,bytes,bytes).notice: Gateway callback delivering the decrypted aggregate total. Performs the single         pooled vault deposit and records the public batch-wide exchange rate inputs.

userdoc.notice: A confidential, composable yield router for the Zama Protocol.         Users deposit a confidential token (an ERC-7984 wrapper over an ERC-20, e.g. cUSDC)         into one of several registered public ERC-4626 yield vaults (e.g. a Morpho vault),         WITHOUT revealing their individual deposit amount on-chain.         The privacy comes from POOLING: many users join a batch with encrypted amounts;         the contract aggregates them homomorphically; at dispatch ONLY the aggregate total         is decrypted; a single deposit is routed into the public vault on behalf of the whole         pool; and each user claims their confidential vault-share balance back pro-rata,         entirely in the encrypted domain.         This is the Season 3 "Composable Privacy" thesis made concrete: a confidential asset         (ERC-7984) composed with the rest of the public EVM (ERC-4626) through an audited         pooling pattern, with a one-click confidential cross-vault MIGRATION on top — a flow         that the official single-vault v1 batcher does not yet expose to users.
